economic_notes: Kebaowek Land Management Inc. is a wholly-owned GBE accounted for on modified equity basis. Migizy Odenaw Inc. is a wholly-owned subsidiary consolidated into financial statements. Kebaowek Land Management Inc. acquired a subsidiary on October 19, 2019. Forestry contracts and natural resources activities noted.
notes: Fiscal year 2020. Province is QC (Quebec). Two controlled entities: Migizy Odenaw Inc. (consolidated subsidiary) and Kebaowek Land Management Inc. (GBE on modified equity basis). Change of accounting policy effective April 1, 2019 to account for Kebaowek Land Management Inc. on modified equity basis, applied prospectively. Councillors' honoraries disclosed at $27,000 but no individual remuneration schedule provided. No budget figures presented despite PSAS requirement - flagged by auditor. ISC funding calculated as sum of ISC Flexible + Fixed + Block + Health Branch contributions net of unexpended adjustments; total government transfers taken from segment disclosure totals (federal $8,620,910 + provincial $441,315 = $9,062,225). OSR calculated as total revenue $13,847,594 minus total government transfers $9,062,225 = $4,785,369. Annual debt service reflects reimbursement of long-term debt per statement of cumulative surplus ($247,918); RRAP reimbursements of $50,921 additional. Long-term investments include $2,788,286 equity in Kebaowek Land Management Inc. Net surplus in controlled entity (GBE) of $20,289 included in surplus for year.
